name: Carol Thompson
title: Backyard Poultry Keeper
bio: Carol Thompson has raised laying hens in both suburban and rural backyards for over a decade, learning most of it the hard way. She writes the practical, specific guidance she wishes she had when she started. At Chicken Keeper Guide she covers small-flock keeping, breeds, and daily care.

name: Dr. Tom Henderson
title: Poultry Health Reviewer
bio: Dr. Tom Henderson is a veterinarian with a specialty in poultry health, working with both commercial flocks and backyard keepers. He reviews all health-related content on Chicken Keeper Guide for veterinary accuracy and adds clinical context to help keepers distinguish between normal chicken behavior and genuine health concerns.

name: Sarah Mills
title: Homesteader
bio: Sarah Mills runs a small permaculture homestead where chickens are a core part of the system, contributing pest control, manure, and eggs in exchange for food scraps and a well-designed space. At Chicken Keeper Guide, she covers integrating chickens into gardens, food forest systems, and small farm operations.

name: Mike Carter
title: Coop Builder
bio: Mike Carter has built custom chicken coops for hundreds of clients across a range of climates, property sizes, and flock configurations. He has strong opinions about ventilation, predator proofing, and the design features that make a coop easy to clean and maintain. At Chicken Keeper Guide, he covers coop construction, design principles, and modifications for different climates.

name: Janet Wilson
title: Flock Manager
bio: Janet Wilson has managed a laying flock of 20 to 40 hens for most of the past decade, with a focus on consistent year-round production and breed selection. She has kept extensive records on egg production rates, temperament, and climate suitability of more than a dozen breeds. At Chicken Keeper Guide, she covers breed comparisons, laying hen management, and getting consistent production from a backyard flock.
